generated_assessment.reasoning: As a highly agreeable and conscientious individual, I value stability and cooperation. I support strategic autonomy because it promotes long-term security and reduces reliance on potentially unstable international partners. My low excitement seeking and high self-discipline make me cautious and prefer planned, independent solutions. However, my moderate age and conventional openness make me somewhat pragmatic, not overly idealistic.
